title: Godfrey Louw appointed as acting municipal manager of George
description: GEORGE NEWS - Godfrey Louw has been...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Godfrey Louw has been appointed as acting municipal manager with immediate effect, for a period of three months.


> This follows after the sudden resignation of Dawie Adonis, director of Community Services, from the position of acting MM.


"Louw brings extensive experience to the role, and his appointment is expected to ensure the continued smooth running of municipal operations during this transitional period," said Municipal Spokesperson Chantèl Edwards.

"The municipality looks forward to his leadership in maintaining service delivery and good governance."

Read a previous article:

- Dawie Adonis steps out of messy municipal affairs

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
